commit.message:
fix(github): improve auth fallback handling (#35)

#### Context

Improve GitHub auth fallback behavior in the container runtime and align
the workflow guide with token-based GitHub access.

#### TL;DR

*Persist `gh` auth from token env vars and relax workflow blocker rules
around GitHub access.*

#### Summary

- Log `gh` into github.com from `GH_TOKEN` or `GITHUB_TOKEN` when
available
- Keep `gh auth setup-git` non-fatal and quiet after token-based login
- Add `api_key: $GITHUB_TOKEN` to the workflow tracker config
- Remove the hard prerequisite on GitHub MCP or `github_graphql`
- Update blocker guidance to require trying reasonable fallbacks first

#### Alternatives

- Keep env-only auth without `gh auth login`, but that leaves some
fallback flows unable to update GitHub state
- Keep GitHub as a special blocker case, but that conflicts with the
desired fallback-first workflow

#### Test Plan

- [ ] `make -C elixir all`
- [x] `git push -u origin HEAD`
- [x] Manual review of staged diff for `docker-entrypoint.sh` and
`elixir/WORKFLOW.md`

commit.message:
test(decision_api): add deep branch coverage for unhappy paths (issue #33) (#36)

Adds 13 new scenarios targeting previously uncovered decision_api.lua branches:
- rule_engine returns nil/invalid decision → 503
- throttle delay_ms > MAX_THROTTLE_DELAY_MS (30000) is clamped to 30s
- throttle delay_ms 0 → no sleep, access proceeds
- reject with no retry_after → Retry-After defaults to "1"
- LLM JSON error body for prompt_tokens_exceeded reason
- LLM JSON error body for max_tokens_per_request_exceeded reason
- JWT with 4+ segments (too many dots) → nil
- JWT with 1 segment (only one dot) → nil
- ip_country falls back to X-Country-Code header when geoip var absent
- empty host variable → nil host in request context
- allow decision with no headers proceeds without exiting
- log_handler status 200 → no event queued

547 unit + 65 integration tests passing, luacheck clean.
